body.title: CC inbox — push path from Igor's ticket-trip events to Claude Code
body.text:
# D-cc-inbox-2026-04-23

**title:** CC inbox — push path from Igor's ticket-trip events to Claude Code
**date:** 2026-04-23
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-cc-inbox-storage, T-cc-inbox-producer, T-cc-inbox-consumer

## Narrative

Current state: CC only learns about Igor's state when Akien mentions it. No push path from Igor → CC. That's the exact mechanism the "go-live-when" ticket pattern needs — a trip condition fires, and someone has to notice. Akien notices things Igor tells him (once email works again); CC needs its own inbox.

Shape: append-only JSONL at ~/.TheIgors/cc_inbox.jsonl. Igor's subsystems (cc_queue trip handler, pe_chain escalate-consult-exhausted, scope_guard HIGH-inertia block) append entries. CC reads unread on every user prompt ("you've got mail" pattern) and on context-load at session start, surfacing a one-line summary before answering.

Pairs with D-consult-primitive-2026-04-23 — the go-live-when ticket from that decision (T-consult-observe-and-tune) uses this inbox to notify CC when its trip condition fires.

Email bridge (for Akien notification) deferred to a follow-on ticket when email is back up — same producer hook, parallel delivery path.

## Rollup

**Closed at:** 2026-04-23T17:36:55.108905+00:00
**Ticket count:** 3 (all closed)

### Shipped via
- T-cc-inbox-storage (S) — CC inbox storage: append-only JSONL at ~/.TheIgors/cc_inbox.jsonl  `done` — JSONL storage layer + 24 tests. append() non-fatal on I/O; read_unread() newest-first by monotonic id; mark_read; TTL purge 30d. 6ca2fec6.
- T-cc-inbox-producer (S) — CC inbox producer: Igor posts ticket-trip + escalation events  `done` — cc_inbox_bridge + 2 pe_chain hooks (DESIGN_PROPOSAL high/response-expected, block normal/response-expected). scope_guard covered transitively. 6 tests. 940439db.
- T-cc-inbox-consumer (S) — CC inbox consumer: /readinbox skill + context-load auto-read  `done` — /readinbox skill + context-load Step 5.6 unread check + 'you've got mail' pattern documented. End-to-end sanity verified (append → list → mark-all-read flow). 6c1c3101.

_Generated by cc_queue.py _decision_rollup. File-stub until T-decisions-into-palace-subtree moves rollups into the memory palace._

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: open.
